pages.text: Lwando has a little sister named Oyiso. Sometimes she is very cute. But sometimes she turns into a monster.

blocks.text: Lwando has a little sister named Oyiso. Sometimes she is very cute.
But sometimes she turns into a monster.

pages.text: That’s okay, because Lwando is a monster tamer.

blocks.text: That’s okay, because Lwando is a
monster tamer.

pages.text: On Monday, the monster looked angry. But Lwando knew she was just hungry.

blocks.text: On Monday, the monster looked angry.
But Lwando knew she was just hungry.

pages.text: On Tuesday, the monster looked very angry. But Lwando knew she was just tired.

blocks.text: On Tuesday, the monster looked very angry.
But Lwando knew she was just tired.

pages.text: On Wednesday, the monster looked even angrier. But Lwando knew she was just sad.

blocks.text: On Wednesday, the monster looked even angrier.
SCHOOL
But Lwando knew she was just sad.

pages.text: On Thursday, the monster looked furious. But Lwando knew she just needed some quiet.

blocks.text: On Thursday, the monster looked furious.
But Lwando knew she just needed some quiet.
But on Friday, nothing worked.
Then there were two monsters.

pages.text: Luckily, Dad is the best monster tamer of all. He knows you can’t tame monsters by being bigger or angrier.

blocks.text: Luckily, Dad is the best monster tamer of all. He knows you can’t tame monsters by being bigger or angrier.

pages.text: You can only tame monsters by helping them feel safe.

blocks.text: You can only tame monsters by helping them feel safe.
